category_sources: Official Xfig/MCJ pages describe Xfig as an interactive drawing/diagramming tool.
source_facts.description says it is a facility for interactive generation of figures.
display_name_sources: Official Xfig site and SourceForge project use Xfig.
docs_sources: Official MCJ/Xfig documentation pages, including introduction and installation.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project lists Git repositories for xfig; official MCJ installation page points users to the SourceForge project for xfig sources.
tags_sources: Official MCJ introduction describes interactive figure drawing, export formats, and X11 use.
